mapper.select: select cop.id, cop.payment_no, cop.shopping_order_no, cop.buyer_id, cop.merchant_id, cop.user_charge_account, cop.merchant_charge_account, cop.create_time, cop.amount, cop.trade_state as paymentState, cos.payment_type, cop.trade_flow_no, cc.username as username, cmi.merchant_name from cm_order_payment cop left join cm_order_shopping cos on cop.shopping_order_no = cos.order_no left join cm_customer cc on cop.buyer_id = cc.user_id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cos.merchant_id = cmi.id where cop.id = #{id}

select id, payment_no, shopping_order_no, buyer_id, merchant_id, user_charge_account, merchant_charge_account, create_time, amount, trade_state, trade_flow_no, deleted from cm_order_payment where shopping_order_no = #{shoppingOrderNo} order by trade_state desc, create_time desc limit 1
mapper.update:
update cm_order_payment set deleted = '1' where id in
#{id}
